languages.text: {n}Вы достаточно видели Глейто в бою, чтобы уверенно опознать его боевой режим. В таком состоянии он способен оторвать руку или голову в одно движение. Ни заметных ран, ни следов поражения мусорным кодом на первый взгляд в его поведении не заметно.{/n}

{n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы достаточно видели Глейто в бою, чтобы уверенно опознать его боевой режим. В таком состоянии он способен оторвать руку или голову в одно движение. Ни заметных ран, ни следов поражения мусорным кодом на первый взгляд в его поведении не заметно.{/n}

{n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du hast Glaito oft genug in Aktion erlebt, um zu erkennen, dass er sich im Kampfmodus befindet. In diesem Zustand kann er einer Person mit einer einzigen Bewegung den Arm oder Kopf abreißen. Er hat auf den ersten Blick keine sichtbaren Wunden und zeigt keine Anzeichen eines Schadcodes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hast Glaito oft genug in Aktion erlebt, um zu erkennen, dass er sich im Kampfmodus befindet. In diesem Zustand kann er einer Person mit einer einzigen Bewegung den Arm oder Kopf abreißen. Er hat auf den ersten Blick keine sichtbaren Wunden und zeigt keine Anzeichen eines Schadcodes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous avez vu Glaito à l'œuvre assez souvent pour reconnaître son mode de combat. Dans cet état, il est capable d'arracher le bras voire la tête d'une personne en un instant. Il ne semble pas blessé et, à première vue, son comportement ne présente pas les signes d'une corruption par l'anticode.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous avez vu Glaito à l'œuvre assez souvent pour reconnaître son mode de combat. Dans cet état, il est capable d'arracher le bras voire la tête d'une personne en un instant. Il ne semble pas blessé et, à première vue, son comportement ne présente pas les signes d'une corruption par l'anticode.{/n}

languages.text: {n}グライトの戦闘行動を十分に見てきたあなたには、彼の戦闘モードがはっきりとわかった。この状態なら、人の腕や頭を一瞬で引きちぎることができるだろう。目立った傷はなく、一見したところでは破壊コードによる損傷の兆候も見られなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}グライトの戦闘行動を十分に見てきたあなたには、彼の戦闘モードがはっきりとわかった。この状態なら、人の腕や頭を一瞬で引きちぎることができるだろう。目立った傷はなく、一見したところでは破壊コードによる損傷の兆候も見られなかった。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Has visto a Glaito en acción suficientes veces como para reconocer su modo de combate. En este estado, es plenamente capaz de arrancarle la mano o la cabeza a alguien de un movimiento. No ves que tenga heridas y, a primera vista, su comportamiento no parece obra de código chatarra.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Has visto a Glaito en acción suficientes veces como para reconocer su modo de combate. En este estado, es plenamente capaz de arrancarle la mano o la cabeza a alguien de un movimiento. No ves que tenga heridas y, a primera vista, su comportamiento no parece obra de código chatarra.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你对格雷托的动作了如指掌，你很确信它已经进入了战斗模式。在这个模式下，它只要几个简单的动作，就能扯掉一个人的胳膊或腿。格雷托身上并没有明显的伤口，而且乍看之下，它的行为模式也没有遭到废码腐蚀的迹象。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你对格雷托的动作了如指掌，你很确信它已经进入了战斗模式。在这个模式下，它只要几个简单的动作，就能扯掉一个人的胳膊或腿。格雷托身上并没有明显的伤口，而且乍看之下，它的行为模式也没有遭到废码腐蚀的迹象。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Glaito'yu iş üzerinde defalarca gördün, çatışma modunu görünce hemen anlıyorsun. Bu hâldeyken bir insanın kolunu veya kafasını tek hamlede, zorlanmadan koparıp atabilir. Ciddi bir yarası yok ve ilk bakışta davranışlarından herhangi bir hurda kodu hasarı aldığı anlaşılmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have seen enough of Glaito in action to confidently recognise his combat mode. In this state, he is capable of ripping off a person's arm or head in a single motion. He has no visible wounds and, at first glance, his behaviour shows no signs of scrap-code damage.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Glaito'yu iş üzerinde defalarca gördün, çatışma modunu görünce hemen anlıyorsun. Bu hâldeyken bir insanın kolunu veya kafasını tek hamlede, zorlanmadan koparıp atabilir. Ciddi bir yarası yok ve ilk bakışta davranışlarından herhangi bir hurda kodu hasarı aldığı anlaşılmıyor.{/n}
